case_title: BALL, MALCOLM G. VS SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO SF AUTO CENTER, INC RETURNED SIGNED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM MALCOLM G. BALL REC'D.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,617.54 FILED BY BALL, MALCOLM G. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALL, MALCOLM G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER INC. PLAINTIFF IS OWED $112.50 WHICH WAS ISSUED 5/11/94 VIA MONEY ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURTESY COPY OF LETTER MAILED TO MR. M. BALL FROM PETER KOLINSKY.\
